SCISSOR, Dayton Stewart. The

ed for Doak and Witter and a

Viewed from an impartial stand
point, IL the combination goes
through the people will have an
assessor who owes his nomination
to the Washington Water Power
Co., the Spokesman-Review and
Dutch jake to levy their taxes,
and board of equalization with
Dutch Jake's" brother-in-law as a
member to pass on such levy. In
other words, the people of this
county will for the next two years
be absolutely at the mercy of the
Spokesman-Review, the Washing
ton Water Power Co. and Dutch
Jake" in all matters pertaining to
county affairs.
